Event: Titanic Excavation - Feb 2025
Event Date: 26/02/2025
Sage Bot Item Code: AM145
Portal conductor Amulet

Once in a while, the unit launches a healing orb at a random ally. The orb bounces up to 3 times. On hit, the orb triggers once of the following effects:
- The orb has a 65% chance to cast restoration on its target. The unit removes a random debuff and restores 128000 health. It also increases the unit's damage by 50% and health by 30% for 4 sec.
- When hit by the orb, the target has a 35% chance to gain a harmony effect for 4 sec. During this time, the unit with the harmony effect restores 96000 health every second, and all allies in a small radius around the unit being healed restore health equal to 45% of health restored by the main target. When the harmony effect wears off, the main target of the ability and all allies in a small radius around it have their max health, physical and magic armor, and fortitude increased by 50% for 3 sec.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet
